name: Farmer's Strata
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sliced bacon, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C).
2. In a skillet, cook the bacon until crisp; add ham and onion. Cook and stir until the eggs begin to set.
3. Add milk, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Stir well.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, covering with bread cubes, potatoes, and cheese.
5. Bake uncovered in the preheated oven for 65-70 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Yield: 12-16 servings.
